title: National Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: National Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, National Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About National Insurance:
National Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance!
